summary: Telegram exfiltration channel in package main
details: static indicator a static pattern match flags index.js lines 84 and 87 containing api.telegram.org/bot with sendMessage and chat_id= parameters. This is the canonical pattern for exfiltrating data to an attacker-controlled Telegram bot. The package name '0e' is a one-character throwaway name with no legitimate chat/bot purpose described, and the analysis did not produce countervailing context suggesting a legitimate Telegram integration. Hardcoded bot endpoint + sendMessage + chat_id in a published npm module is a well-known exfiltration channel (credential/host data sent to attacker's Telegram chat).

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
